title: Clarinda
content:
Roof Restoration Clarinda

Reliable & Quality Roofing Services in Clarinda. Our team are highly experience in working with everything including cement tiled roofs, flat metal roofs, terracotta tiled roofs or Colorbond roofing.  We are ready to help you restore and repair your roof and guttering. Sandhurst Roofing offers excellent customer service and our team provide quality workmanship on all jobs, big or small. We offer everything from gutter repairs and installation to roof repairs and roof restorations to the residents of Clarinda. Get a Quote!

Gutter Repairs Clarinda

At Sandhurst Roofing, our team of roof plumbers offer a variety of services that will help you fulfil your individual guttering needs. With extensive experience and knowledge, from over 30 years in the industry, we have the skills required to create a well-engineered solution for any guttering issue.

Guttering is one of the most important parts of your roof, and your home. By carrying water away from the main structure of the house, they prevent mould growth, leaks, sagging, rotting and more. We pride ourselves on using only the highest quality products, that’s why your new gutters will be installed using COLORBOND® steel. COLORBOND® steel is one of the most durable materials, this means that not only will they do their job well, but they will last for years to come.

Get a Quote!

Fully Licensed & Insured Roofing in Clarinda

We have you covered whether it’s for roof restoration, gutter repairs or re-roofing. All our services come fully insured and we're fully licensed so you can have peace of mind that your roof repairs or roof restoration will be completed with the utmost care, top quality and high standard by our registered roof tilers and roof plumbers. Sandhurst Roofing will give you honest advice and understands the unique requirements of Clarinda residents. We are pleased to have over 30 years’ experience as a family owned and operated business, developing into one of Melbourne’s primary roofing companies. We guide you every step of the way and take time to consider your exact requirements at every point of the project.

What Our Clarinda Customers Say

Matty from Sandhurst Roofing is the best roofer. Honest punctual and skilled at what he does. Marty made sure roof was all repairs first, chimney flashing valleys and ridges pointed before resurfacing my sisters roof. He not only restored it but it looks brand spanking new again. Would highly recommend Matty as the go to roofer to anyone who needs their old roof restored like new. I’ll definitely be calling Matty again.

Stephanie La
★★★★★

Cannot recommend these guys more highly. We had guttering, down pipes and a old tired tin roof painted and couldn't be happier. The guys did a great job and we were more than happy with the prices. There is a difference when you use tradesmen that care about the customers and enjoy their work. Thanks again Sandhurst Roofing 5 stars from us!

Grunt Mahoney
